reasoning_content: The tools are having persistent issues. Let me try a different approach - I'll use a simple echo command to append to the file.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "echo \"\" >> /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp && echo \"}\" >> /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp", "summary": "Add closing brace to cpp file"
